arts.ttl: Real Madrid’s team concerns ahead of City showdown
arts.sum: The Vini Jr, Mbappé, Rodrygo and Bellingham quartet are responsible for 67% of the team’s goals —two-thirds of Madrid’s tally—shared across eight boots. Despite playing nearly 500 fewer minutes, he’s outscored Bellingham (11 goals).

arts.ttl: Revealed: Bournemouth star's release clause this summer amid interest from Manchester United and Real Madrid
arts.sum: The 19-year-old is attracting interest from top European clubs, including Manchester United and Real Madrid amid his stellar campaign with the Cherries.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs. Man City: Pep Guardiola must "live and die by the youthful sword" as two stars "cannot be dropped" for Champions League tie
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola 'cannot drop' two key Man City players and should name the same team that thrashed Newcastle 4-0 last weekend in Wednesday's crucial Champions League tie against Real Madrid, Citizens expert Steven McInerney tells Sports Mole.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid's Thibaut Courtois confirms Man United support, explains why transfer to Sir Alex Ferguson's side was blocked
arts.sum: Real Madrid goalkeeper Thibaut Courtois admits that he became a fan of Man United in his younger years and wanted to join the club, but a transfer to Old Trafford was ultimately blocked by David de Gea.

arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: £85m Kevin De Bruyne replacement identified, but Citizens 'ready for face-off' with Real Madrid
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly set to go head-to-head with Real Madrid for the signing of an £85m-rated attacking midfielder this summer.

arts.ttl: Vinicius Junior 'waiting for Real Madrid reply' after 'setting contract demands' amid £830m Saudi Pro League offer
arts.sum: Vinicius Junior is reportedly 'waiting for developments' over a new contract at Real Madrid after 'setting a price for his renewal'.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola has already told Mikel Arteta exactly how to solve Arsenal's striker crisis
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's former mentor, Pep Guardiola, is among those managers who may have already answered the question as to whom should fill in as Arsenal's latest frontman

arts.ttl: The true impact of Man City’s Rodri banner and what it revealed about Real Madrid
arts.sum: The Champions League holders are in control after Jude Bellingham’s stoppage-time winner last week, but there is more at stake than a place in the last 16 at the Bernabeu

arts.ttl: Club have to trust player’s word to see off Aston Villa, Manchester City and Brighton
arts.sum: In November, we covered claims which stated Omar El Hilali was of interest to multiple Premier League clubs. Those clubs were named as Manchester City, Aston Villa and Brighton & Hove Albion. El Hilali had already turned down Manchester United when a youth player and had twice rejected overtures from Barcelona, wanting to stay loyal The post Club have to trust player’s word to see off Aston Villa, Manchester City and Brighton appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Man City LIVE: Champions League updates, latest team news, TV, prediction
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola’s side have first-leg deficit to overcome after late drama in Manchester
